title: Gate Summary v1
description: Frozen v1 wire contract. Mirrors the public shape of internal/factory/gate/summary.go. No collection or string limits are added by the schema; only the soft MaxEvidenceLength=240 rendering cap is enforced today.

schema_version.description: Integer discriminator. Must equal 1. Lexical form is enforced by the pre-schema envelope scanner.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp emitted by the producer.

checks.description: List of recorded checks. The original reader does not enforce a collection limit at the wire boundary; consumers may add one separately as a consumer-safety guard without changing the wire contract.

duration_ms.description: Optional wall-clock duration. The original reader does not enforce a minimum or any wire-level constraint here.

evidence.description: Optional human-readable evidence pointer. The original reader applies a 240-character rendering cap (MaxEvidenceLength) but does not enforce a wire-level string limit.
